section.title: NAME
section.p: createNode - Create a node in a ReplicaGroup.

section.title: DESCRIPTION
section.p: Create a node in a ReplicaGroup.

plentry.pd: Specifies the host name of the node.

Node configuration information, such as the configuration log size, whether open affairs, specifically with reference to database configuration.
Format The method "rg.createNode()" contains 4 parameters: Host, Service, dbPath, config. Type the first three parameters are string, required; last one is json object, optional. ("<Host>","<service>","<dbpath>",[{<configParam>:value,...}])

section.title: Examples
section.p: Create a node in port 11800 in ReplicaGroup "group", Specify the log file size is 64MB.

note.p: In a ReplicaGroup, more than one ReplicaGroup can be created. But the margin between two ports of them should not be greater than 5. Because the system controls 5 communication interfaces for each node.
